arts.ttl: Manchester United starting XI vs Liverpool confirmed as three changes made
arts.sum: Man Utd's game against Liverpool on Sunday was in doubt due to snow but the Premier League fixture will go ahead.

arts.ttl: Mohamed Salah contract update: Liverpool eyeing 'replacement' for out-of-contract winger, Arne Slot to sign former Premier League forward
arts.sum: Liverpool will lose Mohamed Salah in the summer for free as things stands, but the Reds will reportedly look to bring a former Premier League winger in as a replacement.

arts.ttl: Liverpool explain Dominik Szoboszlai absence from Man United Premier League clash
arts.sum: Liverpool confirm that Dominik Szoboszlai is absent from their matchday squad to face Manchester United in Sunday's Premier League clash due to illness.

arts.ttl: Konate returns as Liverpool name team to face Man United
arts.sum: Arne Slot has named his Liverpool team to face Manchester United in the Premier League this afternoon. Ibrahima Konate returns for the Reds for the first time since returning from a knee injury. The France international’s last appearance came in the Champions League win over Real Madrid in late November. Konate replaces Joe Gomez at […] The post Konate returns as Liverpool name team to face Man United first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Liverpool vs Man Utd: Confirmed Lineups, Injuries and Score Prediction

arts.ttl: How Liverpool and Man United reached postponement decision after Anfield talks
arts.sum: Latest Liverpool news as the Reds held two meetings at Anfield before confirming the Premier League clash against Manchester United would not be postponed

arts.ttl: Gary Neville and Jamie Carragher show true colours as Liverpool vs Man Utd ON after snow
arts.sum: Manchester United fans might be disappointed by the news their game against Liverpool will go ahead given the team's dreadful form - and Gary Neville certainly appears to share that view

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim sticks to his word with Marcus Rashford decision for Liverpool vs Man Utd
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim previously revealed Marcus Rashford was not likely to be part of his group to travel to Liverpool after struggling with illness - with the England star left out of another matchday squad

arts.ttl: Dominik Szoboszlai absence explained as Ibrahima Konate starts for Liverpool vs Man Utd
arts.sum: Team news confirmed from Anfield as Liverpool entertain Manchester United in the Premier League

arts.ttl: Team News: Slot, Amorim confirm XIs for Liverpool vs. Man United
arts.sum: Liverpool boss Arne Slot and Manchester United head coach Ruben Amorim confirm their starting sides for Sunday's Premier League clash at Anfield.
